name: Sword Road
author: Poki
description: Sword Road is a hack-and-slash action game where you fight through war-torn valleys and enemy strongholds as an armored knight. Master blocking, dodging, and devastating counterattacks in full 3D combat with simple controls. Explore dark forests and fortified castles, upgrade your weapons and armor, and battle foes from foot soldiers to legendary beasts. Can you forge your destiny as champion? How do I play Sword Road? Move: WASD or Arrow Keys Attack: Left Mouse Button or Spacebar Dodge: Right Mouse Button Pause: Escape Who created Sword Road? Sword Road is created by splax.net. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Sword Road for free? You can play Sword Road for free on Poki. Can I play Sword Road on mobile devices and desktop? Sword Road can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
